Reward: Promo or code as text on ledger row

Currency: P or ticket Iconify URL per currency filter

Field (meaning): image — Entity image URL; falls back to icon when none
Reward: Reward image[1] or same as icon
Tier: Tier icon if http URL else same as icon

Field (meaning): results[] — JSON array of chips {type amount label icon sign}
Upload receipt: Points chip from linked earn or estimated_points or []
Activity (campaigns + activity): One or two chips points and/or tickets

Field (meaning): dates[] — JSON array {key label value timestamps}
Mission (campaigns + mission): created_at start_date end_date completed_at if set

Field (meaning): details[] — JSON array {key label value text}
action — Primary CTA object or null
metadata — JSON object with ids / raw fields
filter — Sub-tab / subtype key for UI and p_filter
